postReview.title: Crystal Palace 1-1 Fulham: Cairney rescata un punto desde el banquillo
postReview.description: El Fulham reaccionó para empatar 1-1 con el Crystal Palace el Día de Año Nuevo y rozó la victoria en Selhurst Park en los minutos finales.

postReview.title: Crystal Palace 1-1 Fulham: Super-sub Cairney rescues point
postReview.description: Fulham fought back to earn a 1-1 draw with Crystal Palace on New Year's Day and nearly stole a win at Selhurst Park late on.

postReview.title: Crystal Palace 1-1 Fulham: Cairney super-sub salva un punto
postReview.description: Il Fulham ha rimontato e ha strappato l'1-1 sul campo del Crystal Palace nel giorno di Capodanno, sfiorando anche il colpaccio nel finale a Selhurst Park.

postReview.title: Crystal Palace 1-1 Fulham: super-reserva Cairney salva um ponto
postReview.description: O Fulham buscou o empate por 1 a 1 com o Crystal Palace no Dia de Ano-Novo e quase arrancou a vitória no fim em Selhurst Park.

postReview.title: Crystal Palace 1-1 Fulham: Joker Cairney rettet Punkt
postReview.description: Fulham kam am Neujahrstag bei Crystal Palace nach Rückstand zum 1:1 zurück und hätte im Selhurst Park in der Schlussphase beinahe noch den Sieg geholt.

postReview.title: Crystal Palace-Fulham (1-1) : le super remplaçant Cairney sauve un point
postReview.description: Fulham est revenu accrocher Crystal Palace (1-1) le jour de l’An et a même frôlé le coup parfait en fin de match à Selhurst Park.

postReview.title: كريستال بالاس 1-1 فولهام: البديل الذهبي كيرني ينقذ نقطة
postReview.description: فولهام يعود من التأخر ليخرج بتعادل 1-1 أمام كريستال بالاس يوم رأس السنة

postReview.title: Crystal Palace 1-1 Fulham: suplente de luxo Cairney resgata um ponto
postReview.description: O Fulham reagiu para empatar 1-1 com o Crystal Palace no Dia de Ano Novo e esteve perto de roubar a vitória já perto do fim em Selhurst Park.

preReview.title: Berge relishing upcoming challenges with Fulham to start 2026
preReview.description: Fulham will begin the new year with a London derby against Crystal Palace, a side they lost to three times in 2025.

preReview.title: Berge disfruta de los retos que le esperan con el Fulham para arrancar 2026
preReview.description: El Fulham abrirá el año con un derbi londinense ante el Crystal Palace, rival contra el que perdió tres veces en 2025.

preReview.title: Berge non vede l'ora di affrontare le prossime sfide con il Fulham per iniziare il 2026
preReview.description: Il Fulham inizierà il nuovo anno con un derby di Londra contro il Crystal Palace, squadra contro cui ha perso tre volte nel 2025.

preReview.title: Berge curte os desafios do Fulham na virada para 2026
preReview.description: O Fulham abre o novo ano em um clássico londrino contra o Crystal Palace, adversário para o qual perdeu três vezes em 2025.

preReview.title: Berge se réjouit des défis à venir avec Fulham pour lancer 2026
preReview.description: Fulham lancera la nouvelle année par un derby londonien face à Crystal Palace, qui l’a battu à trois reprises en 2025.

preReview.title: Berge freut sich auf Fulhams Herausforderungen zum Start ins Jahr 2026
preReview.description: Fulham startet das neue Jahr mit einem London-Derby gegen Crystal Palace – gegen den Gegner gab es 2025 drei Niederlagen.

preReview.title: بيرغه يتطلع إلى التحديات المقبلة مع فولهام في مستهل 2026
preReview.description: فولهام يستهل العام الجديد بديربي لندني أمام كريستال بالاس، الفريق الذي خسر أمامه ثلاث مرات في 2025.

preReview.title: Berge entusiasma-se com os desafios que o Fulham terá no início de 2026
preReview.description: O Fulham abre o novo ano com um dérbi londrino frente ao Crystal Palace, adversário diante do qual perdeu por três vezes em 2025.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.defensive_actions_explained: Defensive contributions is the sum of attempted tackles, blocks, clearances, and interceptions.
translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.
